entries.notes: Official Senate Ethics guidance identifies https://efdsearch.senate.gov/search/home/ as the public online access path for Senate financial disclosure reports. No stable person-level source_id, source URL, or PDF URL was identified for the 2023 annual disclosure period without session-bound interaction, so this entry remains pending and no PDF has been acquired.
